evals.name: no_failing_checks
evals.description: PR with all checks passing should return exit code 0
evals.note: PR #807 has all checks passing (as of 2026-02-08)

evals.name: failing_check_mypy
evals.description: PR with mypy type check failure should categorize as TYPE_CHECK
expected_output_contains: Add type hints or configure mypy excludes
evals.note: PR #806 had LR-004 check failure with mypy duplicate module error

evals.name: json_output_format
evals.description: JSON output should contain required fields

evals.name: check_filter
evals.description: Filter by check name should only show matching checks
evals.note: Substring filter should match check name

evals.name: auth_failure_detection
evals.description: Auth failure should exit with code 2 and show remediation
evals.note: Simulates auth failure with invalid auth value
evals.skip_reason: Requires manual testing with invalid auth

evals.name: required_checks_validation
evals.description: Should validate all 8 required checks for main branch
evals.note: Validates all required checks from DISCOVERY_REPORT.md Section 2.1. PR #807 is docs-only so E2E Happy Path is not triggered (paths-ignore filter).

evals.name: required_checks_with_not_found
evals.description: Should report NOT_FOUND checks separately when path filters skip them
evals.note: PR #807 has docs-only changes, so E2E Happy Path (from ci.yaml with paths-ignore: docs/**) is not triggered

evals.name: polling_wait_mode
evals.description: With --wait flag, should poll for in-progress checks
evals.note: Only shows waiting message if checks are IN_PROGRESS when run
evals.skip_reason: Requires PR with in-progress checks at test time

evals.name: matrix_job_detection
evals.description: Should detect and report failures across matrix jobs (Python 3.11 vs 3.12)
evals.note: PR #806 had matrix test failures (if available)
evals.skip_reason: Requires PR with actual matrix failures

evals.name: log_truncation
evals.description: Should truncate logs to specified lines (default 100)

evals.name: lint_category_detection
evals.description: Ruff/Black failures should be categorized as LINT

evals.name: security_category_detection
evals.description: CVE/credential detection should be categorized as SECURITY
evals.mock_log_snippet: Credential detected: REDACTED in file services/foo.py
evals.expected_fix_hint: Remove credentials, update dependencies, or add CVE to allowlist

evals.name: governance_category_detection
evals.description: Delivery gate failures should be categorized as GOVERNANCE

evals.name: e2e_category_detection
evals.description: E2E failures should detect STUB mode patterns
evals.expected_fix_hint: Check if STUB mode expected (PR fork?), verify credentials

setup: Ensure gh CLI is installed and authenticated
Ensure jq is installed (for gh JSON parsing)
run_evals: OR manually test each command from evals

manual_tests.name: Test on live PR with failures
steps: Find a recent PR with failing checks: gh pr list --limit 10 --json number,statusCheckRollup --jq '.[] | select(.statusCheckRollup | any(.conclusion == "FAILURE")) | .number' | head -1
Verify exit code 1 and failing checks are listed

manual_tests.name: Test polling on in-progress PR
steps: Push a new commit to a PR to trigger checks
Verify polling behavior (10s intervals, timeout at 10min)

manual_tests.name: Test auth failure
steps: Verify exit code 2 and remediation message shown
